sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_times (id INT, time_value TIME);
INSERT INTO test_times (id, time_value) VALUES (1, make_time(10, 30, 15.123));
UPDATE test_times SET time_value = make_time(8, 45, 50.456) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, time_value FROM test_times WHERE time_value > make_time(8, 0, 0.000);
SELECT id, make_time(12, 0, 0.000) AS noon_time FROM test_times;
